name: Easy Chicken & Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 21-oz package (packaged) teriyaki stir-fry frozen vegetable combination
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a nonstick skillet.
2. Stir-fry the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the vegetables and stir-fry until crisp-tender.
4. Stir in the contents of the sauce packet and cook until hot.
5. Microwave the French Fried Onions for 1 minute.
6. Sprinkle over the stir-fry.
7. Serve with rice. Makes 6 servings.
Or substitute 4 cups frozen vegetables and 3/4 cup teriyaki stir-fry sauce.
